strengths: Good use of specific metrics to demonstrate impact
Acknowledged trade-offs in system design choices
weaknesses: Tended to rush through the explanation of technical details
Did not address alternative approaches before concluding
improvements: Practice explaining technical concepts at a slower pace, ensuring each step is clearly articulated
When presenting a technical solution, briefly mention at least one alternative and why the chosen approach was preferred
summary: Alex demonstrated solid technical communication skills with clear reasoning around system design decisions. Areas for improvement include more deliberate explanation pacing and proactive consideration of alternatives.
